bead.title: test: add autonomous governed business workflow demo
bead.description:
Context: The product vision north star is that a developer can ship a governed business write through Axon in less than one day with no custom policy, approval, or audit plumbing. The implementation needs an autonomous demonstration that exercises structured data, policy, intent preview, approval/stale safety, audit, and repair in one coherent business workflow.

In-scope files: an integration/e2e test or script under the repo's existing test layout, fixture schema/data, and documentation of the command.
Out-of-scope: marketing docs, UI redesign, or replacing lower-level contract tests.
Implementation hint: use an invoice/procurement-style workflow: create schema/entities/links, query graph/table data, preview a risky mutation, require approval, commit safely, inspect audit lineage, and run rollback dry-run.
bead.acceptance:
1. A single documented command runs the governed workflow demo autonomously.
2. The demo asserts GraphQL plus either MCP or SDK observes equivalent governed outcomes.
3. The demo asserts audit lineage includes actor/tool origin, policy decision, approval decision, versions, and before/after or diff data.
4. The demo command passes locally and is referenced from the HELIX test plan or README.
